change: Replaced freelance chat quick-start chips: "Write a bid proposal" -> "Whats this project" (plain-terms project explainer) and "Draft questions for client" -> "Can we do it?" (autonomous-completion feasibility assessment)
Replaced "Spot red flags" freelance chat chip with combined "Should we bid?" chip (go/no-go verdict merging feasibility + red flags + effort-vs-reward)
Merged "Can we do it?" feasibility content into "Should we bid?" chip and added new "How would we build it?" chip (tech stack + architecture + agent task breakdown) to freelance chat quick starts

Rewrote "Should we bid?" chip prompt: verdict now based solely on whether AI agents can build 100% of the asked work; communication/credentials/deployment/budget/vague-specs/seniority explicitly excluded as human-handled non-blockers; sections = What agents will build / True blockers / Notes for the human / Verdict recap

Added DELIVERY MODEL section to freelance chat system prompt (buildSystemPrompt): projects are built by autonomous AI agents, human handles all non-coding work; budget/seniority/vague-scope/credentials/deployment must never count as blockers or skip reasons; only true build blockers allowed. Also removed budget-too-low skip example from VOICE rules.

Freelance chat description cache: a failed/empty extraction (cached "") is now retried once per app session (in-memory descriptionFetchFailedThisSession set) instead of being permanent; successful extraction still cached forever. No schema change.

Extracted listing full-description fetch/extract/cache into shared src/bun/freelance/description.ts (ensureFullDescription, session-retry semantics). freelance-chat.ts now uses it (with CHAT_FETCHING broadcast hooks); bid-pipeline.ts draftBidForListing now fetches the full description before drafting (was cache-only) and slice cap raised 2000->8000 chars.

Updated Auto-Earn Help tab (auto-earn-help.tsx section 6) and synced docs/autoearn-user-guide.md: documented listing Chat quick starts (Whats this project / Should we bid? buildability-only verdict / timelines / How would we build it) and the full-description fetch+cache behavior behind Create Proposal and Chat

Auto-Earn Help tab section 8 (settings in plain words) updated to cover all current settings: added Max bids / day, Inbox sync min/max interval, and Client quality filters (min reviews / account age, fail-open). docs/autoearn-user-guide.md intentionally defers per-field descriptions to in-app ? icons, no change needed there.

Freelance chat system prompt now tells the model whether the Description is the complete fetched page text (forbid any re-fetch/browser/chrome-devtools) or only the RSS preview (allow one http_request, no browser). Fixes agent redundantly opening a browser to re-read listings whose fullDescription was already cached by the wizard analysis.
Added [freelance-description] console.log diagnostics to ensureFullDescription: cache hit (chars), skipped retry, fetch start (first/retry), extraction OK (chars), extraction empty, fetch failure

Fixed runWizard verdict persistence race: DB writes now happen BEFORE WIZARD_COMPLETE broadcast (not after), and LISTINGS_UPDATED is broadcast immediately after so listing cards reload and show Analysis badges without requiring a page navigation.
